    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    K

    key - Variable in record class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.internal.MessageRegistry.MessageRegistryEntry
    The field for the key record component.
    key() - Element in annotation interface org.tquadrat.foundation.config.INIValue
    The key for the value in the configuration file.
    key() - Method in record class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.internal.MessageRegistry.MessageRegistryEntry
    Returns the value of the key record component.
    key() - Element in annotation interface org.tquadrat.foundation.config.Preference
    The key for the preference; the default is the property name.
    key() - Element in annotation interface org.tquadrat.foundation.config.SystemPreference
    The key for the SYSTEM preference value to read.
